backend/main.mo: Actor module defining food items, orders, carts, and user profiles with Map-based storage, authorization checks, and CRUD operations for menu and profiles.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature requirements to affected frontend files and components with associated test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file providing short summaries of major frontend components, hooks, pages, and utilities for reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind-based global styles defining OKLCH color variables and light/dark theme palettes.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML entry point setting up PWA metadata, icons, manifest link, and mounting root element.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA manifest describing app metadata, icons, theme colors, start URL, and screenshots.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker handling precaching, runtime caching, and offline strategies for assets, images, and API requests.
frontend/PWA_README.md: Documentation explaining PWA demo features, usage, installation, user/admin flows, and offline behavior.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component managing admin mode via localStorage and rendering either the user or admin interface along with global UI elements.
frontend/src/components/AdminOrderDetail: Dialog for admins to view and update order and payment status with detailed order info and actions.
frontend/src/components/AllOrdersManagem: Displays all orders with filtering, real‑time updates, and a dialog to view individual order details.
frontend/src/components/CartDrawer.tsx: Side drawer showing cart items with quantity controls, item removal, and a proceed‑to‑payment action.
frontend/src/components/FoodItemCard.tsx: Card and modal to display food item details and allow adding items to the cart with chosen quantity.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer showing attribution and external link.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Top navigation bar handling authentication, showing user info, and opening the cart drawer.
frontend/src/components/InstallPrompt.ts: Shows a custom PWA install prompt triggered by the beforeinstallprompt event and stores dismiss state in localStorage.
frontend/src/components/MenuManagement.t: Provides a demo interface to add, edit, and delete food items using dialogs and local state with category and price handling.
frontend/src/components/OfflineIndicator: Displays an online/offline status alert based on navigator events, showing a banner when offline or returning online.
Admin-style view for filtering and updating order statuses with live updates and visual feedback during status changes.
frontend/src/components/OrdersSection.ts: Customer-facing order list with real-time updates, payment/status indicators, and a dialog to view full order details.
frontend/src/components/OrderSummaryDial: Shows a detailed order summary dialog including status progression, customer info, payment details, and timestamps.
frontend/src/components/PaymentMethodDia: A dialog that lets users select Cash or UPI and confirm payment, with state tracking and loading handling.
frontend/src/components/PaymentPage.tsx: Displays cart items, total price, and allows selecting a payment method before placing an order.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal that collects and saves the user's name using a simple profile form.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to the user’s identity, invalidating dependent queries when updated.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides authentication state and login/logout handling via Internet Identity using a React context.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for demo-mode user profiles, admin checks, menu items, and cart/order operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind base styles and custom CSS variables for light and dark themes.
frontend/src/lib/cartStorage.ts: Implements localStorage-backed cart management with add, update, remove, clear, totals, and cross-tab sync via custom storage events.
frontend/src/lib/demoData.ts: Provides hardcoded demo food items, image mappings, and a DemoOrderType for mock ordering with payment details.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers and renders the root component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Displays order statistics and provides tabs for viewing all orders, managing orders, and editing the menu.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Shows the menu, category filters, and user orders, with logic for navigating to and from the payment page.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters using sessionStorage and hash/query parsing.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind theme extensions, colors, animations, and plugins including typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Defines the project’s state, existing header-related features, known duplicate-header issue, and a new request to consolidate the header with a subtitle and right‑aligned login button.
